winners: Grand winners of our month-long tournaments will get to drive a range of Aston Martin cars* this August!
package-includes: The Aston Martin Drive Day package includes:
tutoring: Expert tutoring from a racecar driver
learn-more: Learn more about this amazing opportunity
note: * Please note: in case the grand winner declines the prize or is for whatever reason unable to go on the trip, the prize is then forfeited in favor of the person next in line of prize distribution.
